sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Innventure (NASDAQ: INV) executive chair granted 154,829 milestone shares
feed.summary: Innventure's Executive Chairman, Michael Otworth, has been granted 154,829 shares of common stock at no cash cost. This award was provided in connection with achieving a milestone outlined in the company's Business Combination Agreement. Following this transaction, Otworth now directly holds 3,550,087 shares of Innventure common stock.

feed.title: Integer Holdings Earnings Call Flags Tough 2026
feed.summary: Integer Holdings reported mixed Q1 2026 results, with modest sales growth and benefits from share repurchases and lower interest costs. However, these positives were offset by pressure on margins, weaker cash flow, and a cut to its full-year 2026 guidance. The company's board has also initiated a strategic review to unlock shareholder value, positioning 2026 as a transitional year before projected growth reacceleration by 2027.

feed.title: Ebay soars on report GameStop is preparing takeover bid
feed.summary: This article reports that eBay's stock soared following news that GameStop is reportedly preparing a takeover bid for the company. The content suggests significant market reaction to potential acquisition.

feed.title: Santander Brasil (NYSE: BSBR) books R$3.8B profit with 16% ROE in 1Q26
feed.summary: Santander Brasil reported a management net profit of R$3.8 billion in the first quarter of 2026, alongside an accounting net profit of R$3.7 billion, and an ROE of 16.0%. Total revenue increased modestly to R$21.2 billion, supported by growth in net interest income from clients and fee income, despite higher loan loss expenses and a challenging macroeconomic environment. The bank maintained strict cost control, with operating expenses rising below inflation, and expanded its sustainable credit portfolio by 30% year-on-year.

feed.title: CPUC backs $1.45B plan to upgrade California water systems
feed.summary: The CPUC has approved a $1.45 billion infrastructure investment plan for California Water Service (CWT) to upgrade water systems through 2027. The decision also authorizes revenue increases for Cal Water, totaling $90.5 million in 2026, $43.2 million in 2027, and $48.9 million in 2028, with new rates expected to be effective July 1, 2026. This comprehensive plan aims to ensure reliable, safe, and clean water service while incorporating mechanisms to enhance financial stability for the utility.

feed.title: (BSJU) and the Role of Price-Sensitive Allocations
feed.summary: An analysis of Invesco Bulletshares 2030 High Yield Corporate Bond ETF (NASDAQ: BSJU) indicates a neutral sentiment across all time horizons with a mid-channel oscillation pattern. The report identifies an exceptional 5.0:1 risk-reward setup targeting a 1.4% gain versus 0.3% risk. It also outlines three distinct trading strategies—Position Trading, Momentum Breakout, and Risk Hedging—designed for various risk profiles and holding periods, based on AI models.

feed.title: (BSM) Movement as an Input in Quant Signal Sets
feed.summary: This article from Stock Traders Daily provides an AI-driven analysis of Black Stone Minerals L.p. (NYSE: BSM), highlighting neutral near and mid-term readings but a strong long-term positive bias. It presents three distinct trading strategies—Position Trading, Momentum Breakout, and Risk Hedging—with specific entry, target, and stop loss zones. The analysis also covers multi-timeframe signal strength, support, and resistance levels for BSM.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Reminds Investors with Losses on their Investment in Coty Inc. Of Class Action Lawsuit and Upcoming Deadlines - COTY
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP has announced a class action lawsuit against Coty Inc. (NYSE: COTY) following disappointing financial results for Q2 fiscal year 2026, which included a decline in its Consumer Beauty segment and the company withdrawing its fiscal year 2026 guidance. Investors who purchased Coty securities during the Class Period are encouraged to contact Pomerantz LLP by May 22, 2026, to seek appointment as Lead Plaintiff. The lawsuit alleges that Coty and its officers engaged in securities fraud or other unlawful business practices, leading to a significant drop in Coty's stock price.

feed.title: Vuzix Grants Performance-Based Restricted Stock Units to Executives
feed.summary: Vuzix (VUZI) has granted significant restricted stock units (RSUs) to its CEO, Paul Travers, and CFO, Grant Russell, totaling 477,178 and 193,258 respectively, under its 2023 Equity Incentive Plan. These awards are structured to vest over several years, with half time-based and the remaining half contingent on performance achievements through December 31, 2028. This move aims to align executive compensation with long-term company performance and shareholder interests, emphasizing multi-year strategic and financial targets.

feed.title: Nurix Therapeutics (NASDAQ:NRIX) CFO Houte Hans Van Sells 2,388 Shares
feed.summary: Nurix Therapeutics CFO Houte Hans Van sold 2,388 shares of NRIX stock to cover tax withholding obligations, reducing his stake by 4.42%. Despite the company missing its latest quarterly earnings and revenue expectations, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average price target of $30.46, significantly higher than its current trading price of $16.70. Several institutional investors have recently adjusted their positions in Nurix Therapeutics.

feed.title: Align Technology (Nasdaq: ALGN) sets $200M open‑market buyback
feed.summary: Align Technology announced a plan to repurchase $200 million of its common stock through open market transactions. This buyback is part of its existing $1.0 billion stock repurchase program, approved in April 2025, and will be funded by the company's cash on hand, expected to be completed by October 2026. As of March 31, 2026, Align reported $1,059.8 million in cash and cash equivalents, with 71.6 million shares outstanding.

feed.title: First Internet Bancorp (INBK) Q1 EPS Profitability Tests Bearish Volatility Narrative
feed.summary: First Internet Bancorp (INBK) reported Q1 2026 revenue of US$26.8 million and basic EPS of US$0.29, despite a trailing twelve-month basic EPS loss of US$3.84. While recent quarters show profitability, the company's past volatility, particularly a significant loss in Q3 2025, and rising non-performing loans present challenges to a smooth recovery narrative. Valuation signals are mixed, with a low P/B ratio but a DCF fair value significantly below the current share price, making the bull case reliant on strong future growth.

feed.title: Hubbell (NYSE:HUBB) Releases Quarterly Earnings Results, Beats Expectations By $0.06 EPS
feed.summary: Hubbell (NYSE:HUBB) reported strong Q1 earnings, beating analyst expectations with adjusted EPS of $3.93 on revenue of $1.52 billion, an 11.1% increase year-over-year. The company raised its FY2026 guidance, projecting adjusted EPS of $19.30–$19.85 and total sales growth of 8%–11%, driven by robust performance in Utility Solutions and data-center markets. Hubbell also announced a quarterly dividend of $1.42 and share repurchases, underscoring its commitment to cash returns and conversion.

feed.title: Charles R. Schwab co-chairman sells $15.4m in SCHW stock
feed.summary: Charles R. Schwab, co-chairman of SCHWAB CHARLES CORP (NASDAQ:SCHW), sold approximately $15.4 million worth of company stock through three separate indirect transactions between April 29 and May 1, 2026. Despite these sales, his indirect holdings remain substantial. The company's stock is currently trading at $91.54, and analysis from InvestingPro suggests it is undervalued.

feed.title: Does Crown Castle’s Q1 Profit Amid Full-Year Loss Outlook Change The Bull Case For CCI?
feed.summary: Crown Castle reported a profitable Q1 2026 with US$151 million in net income, a significant improvement from a year prior, despite weaker sales and revenue. However, the company maintained its full-year guidance for a net loss between US$640 million and US$920 million, suggesting 2026 is viewed as a transition year. This outcome highlights the challenge for investors balancing improved quarterly results against ongoing concerns about dividend sustainability and credit profile, and the company's focus on executing its tower-centric model.

feed.title: Epsium Enterprise Names Veteran Compliance Specialist Ching Wan Wong as New CFO
feed.summary: Epsium Enterprise Limited has appointed Ching Wan Wong as its new Chief Financial Officer, effective May 1, 2026, following the resignation of Ming Yin Gordan Au Yeung. Wong brings over 25 years of experience in finance and regulatory compliance, which is expected to support Epsium's complex cross-market reporting obligations. Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates EPSM as "Neutral" due to deteriorating financial performance and technical challenges, despite the stock being oversold.

feed.title: BALL Corp (NYSE: BALL) director adds equity through RSU grant and vesting
feed.summary: Cynthia A. Niekamp, a director at BALL Corp (NYSE: BALL), has increased her equity holdings through routine stock-based compensation. She received an annual grant of 2,903 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) and had 3,369 RSUs vest and convert into common shares. Following these transactions, her direct ownership totals approximately 24,949 common shares, reflecting compensation and vesting activity rather than open-market trading.

feed.title: GreenPower Announces Resignation of Sebastian Giordano; Transition to Advisory Role
feed.summary: GreenPower Motor Company Inc. announced that Sebastian Giordano has resigned from its Board of Directors, effective May 1, 2026. Mr. Giordano will transition to an advisory role, providing strategic guidance to the company. CEO Fraser Atkinson thanked Giordano for his contributions and expressed satisfaction that his expertise will continue to benefit GreenPower's growth.

feed.title: Itaú Unibanco Refreshes Audit Committee with Appointment of Veteran Banker
feed.summary: Itaú Unibanco has appointed Antonio Francisco de Lima Neto to its statutory Audit Committee, an independent member bringing extensive experience in banking oversight and risk management. This move, pending ratification by the Central Bank of Brazil, strengthens the bank's governance and ensures continuity in audit supervision. Analysts currently rate ITUB stock as a Buy with a $9.00 price target, while TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates it as Outperform due to solid financial performance and favorable valuation.

feed.title: Itaú Unibanco Files 2025 Integrated Annual and ESG Reports With Brazilian Regulator
feed.summary: Itaú Unibanco, a leading Brazilian banking group, filed its 2025 Integrated Annual and ESG Reports with the Brazilian Securities and Exchange Commission on April 30, 2026. This action reinforces the bank's commitment to transparency, providing detailed insights into its business strategy, operating results, and environmental, social, and governance performance. Analysts currently rate ITUB stock as a Buy with a $9.00 price target, while TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, also rates it as Outperform due to solid financial performance, favorable valuation, and a strong uptrend.

feed.title: Canaccord Genuity Group Issues Pessimistic Forecast for iRhythm Technologies (NASDAQ:IRTC) Stock Price
feed.summary: Canaccord Genuity Group has lowered its price target for iRhythm Technologies (NASDAQ:IRTC) from $198.00 to $180.00, while maintaining a "buy" rating. Several other analysts have also reduced their price targets for IRTC. Despite Q1 revenue exceeding expectations by 25.6% year-over-year, the company remains unprofitable, and insider selling has been noted.

feed.title: Innventure (INV) CEO receives 46,460-share milestone stock award
feed.summary: Innventure (INV) CEO Gregory W. Haskell was granted 46,460 shares of common stock on April 17, 2026, at a price of $0.00 per share. This award was a result of achieving a milestone outlined in a Business Combination Agreement from October 24, 2023. Following this transaction, Haskell now directly holds 929,803 shares of Innventure stock, with the company noting that the filing was late due to an administrative error.

feed.title: Milestone stock grants boost Innventure (NASDAQ: INV) director holdings
feed.summary: Innventure (NASDAQ: INV) director James O. Donnally received two indirect stock awards of Common Stock on April 17, 2026, totaling 27,849 and 80,848 shares, granted upon achieving a milestone in a Business Combination Agreement. These awards, valued at $0.00 per share, significantly increased his indirect holdings, which now stand at 4,708,121 and 1,607,619 shares respectively. The filing noted that the transaction was reported late due to an administrative error.

feed.title: Innventure (INV) CFO Yablunosky awarded 1,236 shares after milestone achievement
feed.summary: Innventure (INV) CFO David Yablunosky was awarded 1,236 shares of common stock at a price of $0.00 per share, following the achievement of a milestone under the company's Business Combination Agreement. This grant brings his direct holdings to 543,994 shares of Innventure common stock. The Form 4 filing for this transaction was reported late due to an administrative error.

feed.title: Merck (MRK) EVP exercises 1,967 RSUs; 969 shares used for taxes
feed.summary: Merck EVP Chirfi Guindo exercised 1,967 restricted stock units, with 969 shares withheld for tax obligations. Following this transaction, Guindo directly holds 61,613.127 Merck common shares, 57.1377 shares indirectly through a 401(k), and 3,935 restricted stock units. The remaining RSUs will vest in three equal installments on April 29, 2026, 2027, and 2028.

feed.title: Alphabet director Frances Arnold sells $37,842 in class C stock
feed.summary: Alphabet director Frances Arnold sold 102 shares of Class C Capital Stock for $37,842 on April 30, 2026, at $371.00 per share, reducing her direct holdings to 18,621 shares. This transaction was conducted under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan established in August 2025. The sale occurred amidst positive analyst sentiment for Alphabet, with several firms raising price targets due to strong first-quarter 2026 results and growth in cloud and AI initiatives.

feed.title: Campbell’s faces lawsuit over microplastics in its microwavable soup
feed.summary: Campbell's is facing a class-action lawsuit alleging its "microwavable" soup bowls shed microplastics into the food when heated. The lawsuit claims Campbell's misled consumers by marketing polypropylene containers as safe for microwave use despite knowing the potential for microplastic contamination. Millions of consumers may have unknowingly exposed themselves to dangerous microplastics due to Campbell's alleged failure to warn customers about these risks.

feed.title: GameStop preparing acquisition offer for eBay in dramatic e-commerce pivot
feed.summary: GameStop is reportedly building a stake in eBay and planning a potential acquisition offer as early as this month, according to a WSJ report. GameStop's CEO, Ryan Cohen, may submit the offer directly to shareholders if eBay's board resists. This move signals a dramatic e-commerce pivot for GameStop.

feed.title: McDonald’s Is Down 4% and Starbucks Is Up 25% in 2026. The Better Dividend Stock Might Surprise You.
feed.summary: This article compares McDonald's (MCD) and Starbucks (SBUX) as investment opportunities, focusing on their business models, financial health, and dividend profiles. Despite Starbucks' higher year-to-date stock performance, McDonald's is presented as the superior dividend stock due to its stronger financials, franchise-based model, and consistent dividend history, positioning it as a more stable income-focused investment.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin Selected for U.S. Space Force's Space-Based Interceptor Development
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin has been chosen by the U.S. Space Force for the Space-Based Interceptor (SBI) program, a move aimed at establishing an integrated homeland defense system. This initiative will leverage Lockheed Martin's expertise from combat-proven interceptors to develop, test, and integrate SBI capabilities, with a goal to deliver an integrated demonstration by 2028. The program seeks to expand coverage, enhance survivability, and strengthen deterrence against emerging missile threats by creating a multi-domain shield.

feed.title: Invesco Announces Changes to its Canadian Product Line-up
feed.summary: Invesco Canada Ltd. has announced proposed changes to its Canadian mutual fund and ETF line-up, including name changes for two multifactor index ETFs, termination of certain mutual fund series, and the complete termination of the Canadian Dollar Cash Management Fund and Invesco ESG Global Bond ETF. These terminations are part of a larger transaction where CI Investments Inc. is set to acquire Invesco Canada's fund management agreements.

feed.title: ICON plc Delays Annual 20-F Amid Restatement
feed.summary: ICON plc has announced a delay in filing its 2025 Form 20-F (Yearly Report) due to a comprehensive accounting restatement of its financial statements from 2023 through September 2025. The company's audit committee determined that prior financial statements should no longer be relied upon, necessitating more time to finalize the restated numbers and disclosures. While the impact on 2025 results is expected to be significant, ICON cannot yet quantify it, leaving investors with uncertainty as the review continues.

feed.title: Brown & Brown (BRO) Is Down 12.5% After Strong Q1 Results And Dividend Declaration – Has The Bull Case Changed?
feed.summary: Brown & Brown (BRO) reported strong Q1 2026 results with US$1.90 billion in revenue and US$426 million net income, along with a declared dividend of US$0.165 per share. Despite these positive results, including improved adjusted margins and EPS, the stock is down 12.5%. The article explores whether the company's consistent execution and profitability, coupled with an acquisition-supported model, can offset concerns regarding falling catastrophe property rates and organic growth challenges.

feed.title: Blackstone’s head of international says firm has ample liquidity
feed.summary: Dan Leiter, head of international at Blackstone Credit & Insurance, confirms the firm has ample liquidity, allowing it to honor all withdrawal requests from its private credit perpetual fund. He noted that other competitors capped redemptions due to different liquidity profiles but that Blackstone's decision was the right thing to do. Leiter also predicts private credit's attractive return profile will soon be evident, despite negative headlines, and addresses the performance of Blackstone's credit portfolios amidst AI disruption and the Iran war.

feed.title: Harley-Davidson Recalls Multiple M-8 Models For Blocked Breather Ports
feed.summary: Harley-Davidson has issued a recall for 88,039 Milwaukee-Eight engine models, including Softails, Trikes, and Touring bikes, due to potentially blocked airbox breather ports. This defect, estimated to affect 0.4% of units, can cause pressure build-up in the crankcase, leading to oil expulsion when the dipstick is removed and posing an injury risk. Dealers will inspect and resolve the blockages, with owners receiving notifications between May 5 and May 20.

feed.title: David Copperfield plays final show at MGM Grand after 25 years
feed.summary: David Copperfield concluded his 25-year residency at the MGM Grand, performing his final show at the renamed David Copperfield Theater. While his future plans for large-scale magic productions remain unspecified, many in the magic community anticipate his return. The article also addresses past controversies, including his association with Jeffrey Epstein and allegations of sexual misconduct, which his legal team denies.

feed.title: EVP Steve Gassen (NYSE: SLB) exercises options and sells shares
feed.summary: SLB's EVP, Geographies, Steve Matthew Gassen, exercised non-qualified stock options for 33,379 shares and subsequently sold 53,379 common shares through open-market transactions. The sales were executed at weighted average prices around $56.19 and $56.16 per share, totaling approximately $3.00 million. Following these transactions, Gassen directly holds 47,421 shares and indirectly holds 5,739 equivalent shares.

feed.title: iRadimed Corporation (NASDAQ:IRMD) Plans Quarterly Dividend of $0.20
feed.summary: iRadimed Corporation (NASDAQ:IRMD) has announced a quarterly dividend of $0.20 per share, payable on May 29th to shareholders of record by May 15th. This dividend implies a 0.9% yield and a payout ratio of 40.2%, which is well-covered by current earnings. The announcement follows strong Q1 results, where the company surpassed EPS and revenue expectations and provided positive full-year guidance, despite some near-term execution risk due to slightly cautious Q2 revenue guidance.

feed.title: Immunovant (IMVT) director’s 10b5-1 sale leaves 36,394 shares held
feed.summary: Immunovant, Inc. director Robert Graham Susman sold 2,502 shares of common stock at a weighted average price of $27.17 per share. This transaction was conducted under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan established on December 30, 2025. Following the sale, Susman retains 36,394 shares of Immunovant common stock.

feed.title: Operating cash flow per share of Immatics N.V. – MUN:4A3
feed.summary: The article provides financial information for Immatics N.V. (MUN:4A3), specifically focusing on its operating cash flow per share. It presents the value, change, and percentage change for a given period, allowing investors to quickly assess this key financial metric.

feed.title: Gildan Activewear Reports on Shareholders’ Voting Results
feed.summary: Gildan Activewear announced the election of nine directors and shareholder approval for the reappointment of its auditor, the Shareholder Rights Plan, and executive compensation in its annual meeting on April 30, 2026. Detailed voting results were provided for each resolution and director. The company also highlighted its strong sustainability commitment and global market presence.

feed.title: CubeSmart (CUBE) Projects Q2 Earnings Between 38 to 40 Cents
feed.summary: CubeSmart (CUBE) has projected its Q2 earnings per share to be between 38 to 40 cents, surpassing the consensus estimate of 35 cents. The company, a self-storage REIT with a market cap of $9.23 billion, shows strong profitability and growth with a GF Score of 88/100, though financial strength and insider selling raise minor concerns. This outlook reflects its strategic market positioning and operations primarily in high-demand states.

feed.title: Organon (NYSE:OGN) Misses Q1 CY2026 Revenue Estimates
feed.summary: Organon (NYSE:OGN) missed Wall Street's Q1 CY2026 revenue and adjusted EPS estimates, with sales falling 3.5% year-on-year to $1.46 billion and adjusted EPS at $0.71. The company's revenue has been flat over the past five years and has declined annually by 1.5% over the last two years, indicating a struggle with consistent demand growth. Its adjusted operating margin also decreased significantly, reflecting rising expenses and reduced efficiency.

feed.title: Black Hills (NYSE: BKH) investors approve directors, auditor and pay
feed.summary: Black Hills Corporation shareholders, at their Annual Meeting on April 29, 2026, approved the election of three Class II directors, the ratification of Deloitte & Touche LLP as the independent registered public accounting firm for 2026, and, on an advisory and non-binding basis, the compensation of the company’s named executive officers. All proposals received overwhelming shareholder support, with detailed vote counts provided for each. The meeting results reflect shareholder confidence in the company's governance and executive compensation practices.

feed.title: TVA nuclear plant safe during North Alabama earthquake
feed.summary: The Browns Ferry Nuclear Power Plant in North Alabama was unaffected by a 2.5 magnitude earthquake that occurred approximately 4 miles away. The Tennessee Valley Authority (TVA) confirmed that there was no impact to the plant's safe operation, emphasizing that their facilities are designed to withstand seismic activity. This event follows similar assurances regarding even stronger earthquakes near other TVA nuclear plants in the past.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: First Internet Bancorp Q1 2026 EPS beats forecasts
feed.summary: First Internet Bancorp (INBK) significantly surpassed Q1 2026 earnings forecasts with an EPS of $0.29 against a $0.09 forecast, despite revenue falling short of expectations at $43.1 million. The company's stock rose by 1.51% following the announcement, driven by strong net interest income growth, strategic AI investments, and effective balance sheet management. Management remains confident in improving profitability through 2026 and aims for a 1% return on assets by 2027 by leveraging fintech deposits and disciplined lending.

feed.title: ExxonMobil Corporation (NYSE:XOM) to Issue Quarterly Dividend of $1.03
feed.summary: ExxonMobil Corporation (NYSE:XOM) has declared a quarterly dividend of $1.03 per share, payable on June 10th to shareholders of record by May 15th, representing a 2.7% yield. Despite a significant drop in reported GAAP net income due to Iran-related disruptions, the company’s Q1 adjusted earnings and revenue surpassed analyst expectations, driven by higher upstream production, including record output from Guyana. Management also cautioned about geopolitical supply risks and regulatory hurdles that could impact near-term volumes.

feed.title: EBay soars on report that GameStop is preparing a takeover bid
feed.summary: EBay's stock price surged over 13% after the Wall Street Journal reported that GameStop is preparing a bid to acquire the online auctioneer. GameStop's leader, Ryan Cohen, aims to merge the two companies to create a retail powerhouse, betting on their shared interest in collectibles and used goods. This potential acquisition comes as both companies look to adapt to evolving consumer preferences.

feed.title: Ameriprise (NYSE: AMP) board member awarded new phantom stock units
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial Inc. director Christopher J. Williams received an annual grant of 441.7518 phantom stock units, increasing his total holdings to 9,707.6232 units. These phantom shares entitle him to receive one share of Ameriprise common stock each, to be settled in a lump sum after he ceases to be a non-employee director. This transaction is considered a neutral filing impact as it's an equity compensation award rather than a market purchase or sale.

feed.title: Director Brian Shea awarded phantom stock units at Ameriprise (NYSE: AMP)
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial director Brian T. Shea was granted 441.7518 phantom stock units, linking his compensation to the company's common stock performance. This award increases his total phantom stock holdings to 5,863.1739 units, which will be settled in Ameriprise common shares in a lump sum after he ceases to be a non-employee director. The transaction, a grant rather than a purchase, is part of his deferred equity-based compensation as reported in a FORM 4 filing.
